title: Voxel Engine Prototyping
description: A custom voxel rendering engine built from scratch using C# and MonoGame. Features include greedy meshing for optimized chunk rendering, multi-threaded chunk generation using Perlin noise, and custom HLSL shaders for dynamic lighting and ambient occlusion.

title: Cybernetic Rogue
description: A fast-paced 2D roguelite developed in Unity utilizing a custom Entity-Component-System (ECS) architecture for handling thousands of active projectiles. Implemented A* pathfinding for enemy AI and a modular weapon generation system.

title: Level Editor & Asset Pipeline
description: A standalone desktop application built with C# and WPF for designing 2D tile-based levels. Includes a custom binary serialization format for fast loading and a Node.js/Express backend for syncing level data across multiple developers.
